metadata.title: All Shook Up
metadata.lyrics:
[00:06.29] Oh, well, a-bless my soul, what's wrong with me?
[00:09.98] I'm itchin' like a man on a fuzzy tree
[00:13.02] My friends say I'm actin' wild as a bug
[00:15.92] I'm in love
[00:17.98] I'm all shook up
[00:19.28] Hm, ooh, yeah-yeah, yeah
[00:25.40] Oh, well, my hands are shaky, and my knees are weak
[00:29.20] I can't seem to stand on my own two feet
[00:32.57] Who do you thank when you have such luck?
[00:35.44] I'm in love
[00:37.37] I'm all shook up
[00:38.63] Hm, ooh, yeah-yeah, yeah
[00:45.35] Well, please, don't ask me what's upon my mind
[00:48.55] I'm a little mixed up, but I feel fine
[00:52.18] When I'm near the girl that I love best
[00:55.37] My heart beats, so it scares me to death
[00:58.06] When she touched my hand, what a chill I got
[01:01.57] Her lips are like a volcano that's hot
[01:04.86] I'm proud to say that she's my buttercup
[01:07.52] I'm in love
[01:09.61] I'm all shook up
[01:10.85] Hm, ooh, yeah-yeah, yeah
[01:17.44] My tongue gets tied when I try to speak
[01:20.58] My insides shake like a leaf on a tree
[01:23.65] There's only one cure for this body of mine
[01:26.89] That's to have that girl that I love so fine
[01:30.12] She touched my hand and what a chill I got
[01:33.38] Her lips are like a volcano that's hot
[01:36.63] I'm proud to say that she's my buttercup
[01:39.58] I'm in love
[01:41.45] I'm all shook up
[01:42.73] Hm, ooh, yeah-yeah, yeah
[01:48.87] Hm, ooh, hey-yeah
[01:54.27] I'm all shook up
[01:55.96]
